title: Goldman Sachs Has 5 Conviction List Dividend Stocks to Buy That Fight Inflation
text: While the ongoing Russia-Ukraine saga stays in the headlines, the other item that Wall Street is the most focused on is the raging inflation that continues to push higher.

title: BofA Upgrades DTE Energy After Beat, Says Company Has Among Best Earnings Growth In Sector
text: DTE Energy Co (NYSE: DTE) reported its fiscal 2021 results ahead of expectations, raised its 2022 earnings guidance range and provided a “strong affirmation of the long-term growth trajectory,” according to BofA Securities. The DTE Energy Analyst: Julien Dumoulin-Smith upgraded the rating for DTE Energy from Underperform to Buy, while raising the price target from $111 to $127.
